vuln_q_0081_0002.description: Setting missing host key policy to AutoAddPolicy may be unsafe.

vuln_q_0041_0001.title: Polynomial regular expression used on uncontrolled data
vuln_q_0041_0001.description: This [regular expression](1) that depends on a [user-provided value](2) may run slow on strings with many repetitions of '?'.

vuln_q_0031_0000.title: Information exposure through an exception
vuln_q_0031_0000.description: [Stack trace information](1) flows to this location and may be exposed to an external user.

vuln_q_0031_0000.title: Flask app is run in debug mode
vuln_q_0031_0000.description: A Flask app appears to be run in debug mode. This may allow an attacker to run arbitrary code through the debugger.

vuln_q_0086_0003.title: Reflected server-side cross-site scripting
vuln_q_0086_0003.description: Cross-site scripting vulnerability due to a [user-provided value](1).

vuln_q_0041_0000.title: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data
vuln_q_0041_0000.description: [Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
